sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100036" key="suneleustiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνελευστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n100036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disposed for society</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ς</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.757c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
